archetype.name: Rivethun Invoker
archetype.note: This archetype offers Overpowering Charge at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Overpowering Charge
feat.text: You trample foes as you charge past. When you use Barreling Charge and successfully move through a creature’s space, that creature takes bludgeoning damage equal to your Strength modifier. On a critical success, the creature takes double damage and is off-guard until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
